body.u: No body in the world stays young, we all hope that we will, also I remember looking back through my days when I was young, “No I am not young now, I am a long way from it.

I had my days. I remember when I was 16 years old just doing my exams at the time. Yes it was heart but I manigedmanaged to get through them. The hardest time was when I tried looking for a job. My friend came with me and I worked in the co-op.
19 I went to Spain with Alex that was my boyfriend.
At 21 Alex wanted to marry me, but I wanted to have a good first before I got marryedmarried and have children.

Well 35 I was and I have a good time in my life. I didn’t marry Alex because I didn’t love him. Few years went on and I had a good job and money so I went on hoildayholiday with a friend, while I was on hoildayholiday I went out with a man, name John 30 and 2 mouthmonth we were marryedmarried, year went on we had 2 boy and 2 girls and we lived in a big house in the country.
Many year went on and I was 50. All of my children had left home and had a family of theretheir own.
Me and my husband moved into a smaller house in town I was on aan old aged we had a good time in our life time.

60 my legs and other parts of my was not the same it was very hard to get around, years went past I was 60 all my family came down and they gave me a big 60th birthday. It was so nice of them I can remember blowing the candallscandles out. Tiers rolling down my chin. That was like one of the happiest days of my life.
